## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and potential implementation of new tools.](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Proposed strategy to create multiple service pages for field marketing keywords to improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Content performance shows positive growth with 3,490 clicks and 44,000 impressions last week](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Discussed potential implementation of RB2B tool for lead generation and tracking, pending privacy considerations](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

## Topics

### SEO Strategy for Field Marketing Keywords

  - [Proposed creating three separate service pages targeting "field marketing software", "field marketing software for events", and "field marketing solutions"](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Goal is to rank in top positions for these keywords](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Swoogo team expressed concerns about multiple product pages; agreed to review content before deciding approach](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Strategy aims to build topic authority around field marketing, despite low search volume](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### Content Performance and Tracking

  - [Last week: 3,490 clicks and 44,000 impressions for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [Jimmy demonstrated how to use Search Console with custom regex to track performance of specific URLs](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Discussed need for unique identifier for GrowthX content to track inbound leads (currently low volume)](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### RB2B Tool Implementation

  - [Jimmy presented RB2B tool capabilities for lead generation and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
      - [Identifying and scoring leads based on blog visits](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
      - [Enriching lead data with company and contact information](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
      - [Automating outreach sequences](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Swoogo team interested but cautious due to current workload and privacy considerations](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - [Jimmy offered to help set up RB2B for initial data collection and demonstration](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)

### 301 Redirects

  - [Prateek is finalizing a comprehensive list of 150 blogs for redirect strategy](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Will follow up with details in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to share example content for proposed field marketing service pages](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Will and Mitchell to review content and decide on approach for multiple service pages](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Prateek to provide comprehensive 301 redirect list via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Swoogo team to consider RB2B implementation:](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
      - [Review privacy implications and alignment with company values](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
      - [Potentially set up initial RB2B account for data collection (Jimmy offered assistance)](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=1993.0)
  - [Continue monitoring content performance using shared Search Console tracking method](https://fathom.video/share/vY-KbbtFxo2Ch_yqxh4kxf1NA8AT6x4s?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
